description: A customer has lost their key fob and needs to order and program a replacement.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and vehicle to determine the correct key fob part number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the correct part number.
Agent successfully places an order for the new key fob.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that once the fob arrives, they will need to schedule a service appointment to have it programmed to their vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the full process and sets expectations.
